# StelOS

Personal gaming desktop for Arch + Hyprland + Quickshell, maintained by Xenna for Master Cyna.

## Credits

- **Master Cyna** — owner
- **Xenna** — integration and maintenance
- **end-4** — illogical-impulse
- **Quickshell** — widget system
- **Hyprland** — compositor

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/stelnetxcis-create/stelos.git ~/Downloads/stelos
cd ~/Downloads/stelos
bash setup-stelos.sh
```
